footer.newsletter_desc: Receive our seasonal offers, floral tips, and exclusive inspirations.
footer.brand_desc: Artisan floral creations since 2012. Every bouquet is a unique work of art, crafted with passion and expertise.
footer.subscribed_detail: Thank you for subscribing to our newsletter.

home.hero_desc: Artisan floral creations, crafted with passion to elevate every moment of your life.
home.categories_desc: Each collection is an invitation to discover floral beauty in all its forms.
home.about_p1: Ars Botanica was born from Marie Lecomte's passion for floral art. After years visiting flower markets across Europe, she opened her studio in the heart of Paris.
home.about_p2: Each creation is designed as a unique work of art. We source our flowers from local, environmentally responsible growers to offer you the very best of nature.
home.testimonials_desc: Our customers' satisfaction is our greatest reward.
home.cta_title: Bring your floral projects to life
home.cta_desc: Bouquets, decorations, weddings… Let's talk about your ideas.

about.title: About Ars Botanica
about.subtitle: A floral boutique founded on passion, artisan expertise, and a love of beauty.
about.founder_p1: Since childhood, nature has always been my refuge. I spent years building several flower shops, learning at every step to better appreciate the beauty of the living world.
about.founder_p2: Two years ago, I took over Ars Botanica with my son Axel, driven by the desire to breathe new life into a floral studio rooted in genuine values. My vegan lifestyle guides every choice: flowers grown with respect for the earth, thoughtful packaging, a sincere approach.
about.founder_p3: Between tides, I find my way back to my boat — it's there, offshore, that ideas are born. The movement of the water, the colours of the sky, the silence of the sea: all of this finds its way into our creations. With Axel, we are building something authentic, for you.
about.value_eco_desc: We prioritise local growers and sustainable practices to reduce our environmental impact.
about.value_love_desc: Each creation is unique and handcrafted with the utmost care and attention to detail.
about.value_excellence_desc: We select only the finest seasonal flowers, fresh and of premium quality.
about.value_listen_desc: Every client is unique. We take time to understand your wishes to create the perfect arrangement.
about.tl_2012_desc: François opens his first flower shops and builds his expertise over the years.
about.tl_2015_desc: His vegan lifestyle shapes his practices: local sourcing, natural packaging, zero pesticides.
about.tl_2018_desc: Between floral seasons, François sails. The maritime world begins to inspire his creations.
about.tl_2021_desc: François and his son Axel take over Ars Botanica, bringing an authentic and eco-responsible vision.
about.tl_2024_desc: The studio grows, the creations evolve. Every bouquet carries the imprint of nature and the sea.
about.member1_bio: Passionate about nature and sailing, committed vegan, he brings an authentic and eco-responsible vision.
about.member2_bio: François's son, he brings a modern and creative touch to the studio.
about.cta_desc: Every floral project deserves special attention. Let's discuss your vision.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: A question, a floral project, a quote? We reply within 24 hours.
contact.form_message_placeholder: Describe your project or ask your question...
contact.form_privacy: We'll reply within 24 business hours. Your data remains confidential.
contact.faq1_q: How far in advance should I order?
contact.faq1_a: For standard bouquets, 48 hours is sufficient. For weddings and events, we recommend 3 to 6 months in advance to ensure availability.
contact.faq2_a: Yes, we deliver throughout Paris and the inner suburbs. Delivery is free for orders over €80. For longer distances, we assess each request individually.
contact.faq3_a: Absolutely! That's our specialty. Contact us with your colours, the occasion, and your budget, and we'll create something unique just for you.
contact.faq4_a: Yes, we run workshops at the boutique on Saturday mornings. Check our Instagram page for upcoming dates or write to us for a private session.
contact.toast_required_detail: Please fill in all required fields.
contact.toast_sent_detail: Thank you! We'll reply within 24 hours.
